title: eugenia supraaxillaris
intro: Eugenia supraaxillaris, also known as the Brazilian guava or the Brazilian strawberry tree, is a species of flowering plant in the family Myrtaceae. This plant has been found to possess medicinal properties due to its high concentration of flavonoids, phenolic acids, and tannins, which contribute to its potential health benefits. The health benefits of Eugenia supraaxillaris include its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which may help to protect against oxidative stress and inflammation, as well as its potential to aid in the management of certain diseases. Eugenia supraaxillaris can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or extracts, which can be consumed to take advantage of its medicinal properties and health benefits.
